data.title: Binance Wallet Exclusive TGE: Early Project Applications Now Open
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance announced that it invites project parties to apply to participate in the Binance Wallet exclusive TGE (Token Generation Event). Binance Wallet is committed to helping small and medium-sized potential projects launch their tokens fairly through exclusive TGE activities and reach active real user groups. After the token is launched, the token will be included in Binance Alpha. As the Binance platform listing observation selection pool, Binance Alpha is a platform for showcasing early crypto projects with growth potential. In addition, projects can also obtain liquidity support from Binance Wallet to start on-chain liquidity.

data.title: Japanese Crypto Platform BitTrade to List on UPCX
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Japanese cryptocurrency trading platform BitTrade announced that it will launch UPCX (UPC) from 15:00 Thursday, March 27 (planned). BitTrade has completed registration with the Japanese Financial Services Agency and the Finance Bureau, aiming to combine real-world finance and payments with blockchain. UPCX (UPC) is the platform's native token.

data.title: Rep. Byron Donalds introduces bill to make Trump’s strategic Bitcoin reserve permanent
data.description:
US Representative Byron Donalds is moving fast to make sure that President Donald Trump’s executive order on Bitcoin stays locked in for good. Later today, the Florida Republican will introduce a bill to Congress that would prevent any future president from undoing the strategic Bitcoin reserve and crypto stockpile that Trump ordered earlier this month. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/donalds-bill-trump-bitcoin-reserve-permanent/

data.title: Asset Management Company REX Financial Launches Bitcoin Corporate Treasury Convertible Bond ETF
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Asset management company REX Financial announced the launch of the REX Bitcoin Corporate Treasury Convertible Bond ETF. The ETF is listed on the Nasdaq under the code BMAX. It is mainly aimed at retail investors and investment advisors. It is a convertible bond issued by a company that supports incorporating Bitcoin into its financial strategy. (Businesswire)

data.title: Beam Foundation: More than 40.8 billion BEAM tokens have been destroyed so far
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Beam Foundation disclosed the latest data on the X platform, showing that 40,803,498,453 BEAM tokens have been destroyed so far, aiming to continue to strengthen the ecosystem using the deflation model.

data.title: RedStone launches DRILL plan, 4.5% of token supply to be allocated to core users
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News DeFi oracle RedStone announced the launch of the RedStone DRILL program on the X platform, which will allocate 4.5% of the RED supply to RedStone's core users to reward early adopters of RedStone technology and incentivize the rapid growth of the RedStone ecosystem. The DRILL program is built through five strategic pillars to create a lasting impact: Develop (will receive 15% of the allocated tokens), Reinforce (will receive 60% of the allocated tokens), Innovate (will receive 20% of the allocated tokens), Launch (will receive 5% of the allocated tokens) and Learn.

data.title: BIT Digital: Holding 741.9 BTC and 27,623.2 ETH by the end of 2024
data.description: According to the official announcement, Nasdaq-listed crypto mining company BIT Digital released its 2024 fiscal year performance report, which disclosed that its revenue for the 2024 fiscal year was 949.9 bitcoins, a decrease of 37% from the previous year; as of December 31, 2024, BIT Digital held 741.9 BTC and 27,623.2 ETH in its treasury, with a market value of US$69.3 million and US$92.1 million, respectively.

data.title: S&P 500 Enters Correction Territory Amid Historical Trends
data.description:
According to CoinDesk, the S&P 500 has entered correction territory, marked by a 10% decline from its all-time high. A further drop of 10% would indicate a bear market. However, historical data suggests that such corrections are not uncommon. Since Bitcoin's inception in 2009, the S&P 500 has undergone several 20% corrections. Following the 2008 global financial crisis, the index plummeted nearly 60%. In 2019, during Bitcoin's bear market, the S&P 500 fell by 20%, while Bitcoin experienced an 85% drop from its peak. The COVID-19 crash in March 2020 resulted in a nearly 40% decline for the index, with Bitcoin losing 60% of its value. More recently, in 2022, the index corrected by 25%, and Bitcoin reached a cycle low of $15,000 after dropping an additional 25%.

Historically, 10% corrections in the S&P 500 are frequent occurrences. In the current correction, Bitcoin has decreased by 30% from its all-time high. Such declines are typical in past bull market corrections, with the latest 30% correction occurring in August 2024 during the yen carry trade unwind. These patterns highlight the volatility inherent in both traditional and digital markets, emphasizing the importance of understanding historical trends to navigate current market conditions effectively. As investors assess the situation, it is crucial to consider the broader context and historical precedents to make informed decisions.

data.title: Ethena's revenue in the past 24 hours surpassed PancakeSwap and other protocols, ranking among the top three in the crypto revenue rankings
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Defillama data, Ethena's revenue in the past 24 hours has risen to 3.28 million US dollars, surpassing protocols and public chains such as PancakeSwap, Jupiter, Meteora and Tron, and is temporarily ranked third in the crypto revenue list. Tether and Circle ranked first and second with 24-hour revenues of 18.31 million US dollars and 6.12 million US dollars respectively.

data.title: Binance Futures adjusts leverage and margin tiers for AERGO, COMBO and other U-margin perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Contracts will update the leverage and margin ladder of AERGOUSDT, COMBOUSDT, LINAUSDT and VIDTUSDT U-based perpetual contracts at 22:30 on March 14, 2025 (Eastern Time Zone 8).
